message:
fix: hydrate labels in getWispsByIDs for search results

getWispsByIDs (batch fetch used by searchWisps) was returning wisps without
labels. Added batch label hydration via wisp_labels table, matching the
pattern used by getWisp() for single fetches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
